other_observers: Dan Maynard; Dan Maynard had them at his feeders for a few days
specific_location: Around 1325 Indian Oaks Place near Manitou
description: Small white finch with streaking along the flanks, prominent white wingbars, male pink wash on the breast female white breast, red cap, and all yellow bill.Behaviors: Perched high in a tree until they flew off.Call: Goldfinch like two note call. However more buzzy and distinct from all other finches.Plumage: Adult
